atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the `@apply` directive to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the `@layer` directive to tell Tailwind which bucket a set of custom styles belongs to.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Use the `@theme` directive to define your custom design tokens (Tailwind v4+).

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the `@config` directive to specify which config file Tailwind should use when compiling that CSS file.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Use the `@source` directive to specify source files (Tailwind v4+).

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Use the `@utility` directive to define custom utility classes (Tailwind v4+).

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Use the `@variant` directive to apply a variant to styles inside a block (Tailwind v4+).

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Use the `@custom-variant` directive to define a custom variant (Tailwind v4+).
